CONTENT.Players: As of 29 August 2023.Note: Flags indicate national team as defined under FIFA eligibility rules. Players may hold more than one non-FIFA nationality.
CONTENT.Competitions: The league fixtures were unveiled on 7 August 2023.

SUMMARY: The 2023–24 season is Virtus Verona's 103rd season in existence and third consecutive season in the Serie C. They are also competing in the Coppa Italia Serie C.
